info.title: Integra Markets API
info.description: Commodity-aware sentiment analysis API with prediction-market connectors.

post.description: Fetch real news articles from multiple financial sources
Aggregate the latest cached headlines into a market-level sentiment summary.
Fetch personalized news based on user's saved preferences in Supabase
Perform comprehensive analysis with preprocessing and trigger keywords
Summarize a financial news article from URL
Perform AI analysis with reasoning and tools
Chat with AI using tool capabilities

schema.title: Response List Keys Api Keys Get
Response Revoke Key Api Keys  Key Id  Delete

url.title: Url
url.description: URL of the article to summarize

auth_type.title: Auth Type
auth_type.description: Credential mode: none, api_key, or bearer

api_key.title: Api Key
api_key.description: User-provided API key or subscription token

api_key_header.title: Api Key Header
api_key_header.description: Header name used when auth_type is api_key

persist_secret.title: Persist Secret
persist_secret.description: Store the credential encrypted for future connector runs

commodities.title: Commodities
commodities.description: Tracked commodities to include in the dashboard snapshot

refresh_if_empty.description: Fetch headlines if the dashboard cache is empty

text.title: Text
text.description: Text to analyze with the commodity lexicon

commodity.title: Commodity
commodity.description: Commodity context to force during analysis

include_rulebook.title: Include Rulebook
include_rulebook.description: Include the underlying commodity rulebook in the response

max_articles.title: Max Articles
max_articles.description: Maximum number of articles to return

sources.title: Sources
sources.description: Specific news sources to fetch from

hours_back.title: Hours Back
hours_back.description: Hours back to fetch news from

enhanced_content.title: Enhanced Content
enhanced_content.description: Enable full HTML content extraction and NLTK summarization

max_enhanced.title: Max Enhanced
max_enhanced.description: Maximum number of articles to enhance with full content

min_impact.title: Min Impact
min_impact.description: Minimum impact level for alerts (LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH)

topic_text.title: Topic Text
topic_text.description: Market topic or question to score against recent headlines

refresh_if_empty.title: Refresh If Empty
refresh_if_empty.description: Fetch the latest feed if the recent-headlines cache is empty

event_url.title: Event Url
event_url.description: Canonical Polymarket event URL for event-driven analysis

base_url.title: Base Url
base_url.description: Base endpoint or portal URL for the connector

use_personal_subscription.title: Use Personal Subscription
use_personal_subscription.description: Whether this connector should use the user's own vendor credentials

bypass_shared_limits.title: Bypass Shared Limits
bypass_shared_limits.description: Whether requests should avoid shared platform source pools

topic_text.title: Topic Text
topic_text.description: Market topic or question to score

user_id.title: User Id
user_id.description: Optional owning user ID when resolving a saved connector

refresh_if_empty.description: Fetch headlines if cache is empty

credentials.description: Optional one-off BYO credential without saving
